title: Crispy Slow-Cooked Russian Mars Bar Stir-fry
description: A fresh and crisp brunch-mood dish featuring crispy Mars bars cooked at a low temperature to preserve the raw-friendly nature of this snack.

ingredients.name: Mars bars
ingredients.notes: Choose chocolate covered cashews or other non-dairy options if needed.

ingredients.name: Garlic cloves
ingredients.notes: For a raw-friendly version, use raw garlic instead of cooked.

instructions: Slice the Mars bars into thin pieces.
Place the sliced Mars bars on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or silicone mat.
Drizzle olive oil over the Mars bars and sprinkle with salt and black pepper. Toss gently to coat evenly.
Roast in the preheated oven for about 1 hour, flipping once halfway through cooking.
After an hour, remove from the oven and allow to cool slightly before slicing into smaller pieces if necessary.
Sauté minced garlic in a pan with a bit more olive oil until fragrant but not browned.
Add cooled Mars bar slices to the pan and stir fry for about 5 minutes, ensuring they are crispy and golden brown on all sides.
Garnish with chopped parsley before serving.
